title: Backend Developer Vacancy at CGI India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at CGI India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at CGI India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Delhi-based team.

About CGI India:
CGI India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CGI India!
